1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year flood polygons (gjentaksintervall=200) to reduce by municipality extent

3.description: reduce flood polygons to those intersecting Drammen municipality

4.description: get buildings in Drammen with status FA and their geometry

5.description: find buildings that intersect the 200-year flood polygons in Drammen
